metadata.name: Set Up a Tax Payment Plan

description: A citizen owes back taxes and wants to set up a monthly payment plan.

nodes.task_description: Identify the citizen and the total amount of taxes owed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the citizen's tax record and the outstanding balance.

nodes.task_description: Determine eligibility for a payment plan based on agency criteria.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the citizen is eligible to set up a payment plan.

nodes.task_description: Establish the monthly payment amount and schedule, and get the citizen's agreement.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sets up the installment agreement in the system.
